{{CargoRelic
|name=Infinite Can
|class_id=20362
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=This can was produced by the Birds using advanced technology. It can continuously produce food in a mysterious way to feed young Birds. But shortly after it was put into use, the can was banned by the Bird Council and became nothing but a collectible item.
|fame=14
|art=17
|fth=15
|civ=15
|tech=29
|ss1=Egg hatching rate +0.4%
|ss2=Egg hatching rate +0.8%
|ss3=Egg hatching rate +1.2%
|ss4=Egg hatching rate +1.2%
|ss7=Egg hatching rate +1.2%<br> (Awakened)
}}
